prose:
Frontier orbital energies for water (H₂O) computed at the DFT level using the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard'), via PySCF (RKS, exact four-center integrals; density fitting not enabled). Calculation was a single-point energy on the user-supplied geometry at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz. Environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent). Charge: 0, multiplicity: 1 (neutral closed-shell singlet). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity verdict: trustworthy = true (all checks passed).

Key results:
- HOMO (index 4): −8.6037183 eV
- LUMO (index 5): +0.33695037 eV
- HOMO–LUMO gap: 8.9406687 eV  ← headline value
- Total electronic energy: −76.462901 Eh (−2080.6615 eV)

Koopmans/conceptual-DFT descriptors:
- Vertical IP (−ε_HOMO): 8.6037183 eV
- Vertical EA (−ε_LUMO): −0.33695037 eV
- Chemical hardness η: 4.4703343 eV
- Chemical softness σ: 0.22369691 eV⁻¹
- Electronegativity χ: 4.133384 eV
- Electrophilicity index ω: 1.9109156 eV

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1
Output JSON: water_frontier_dft.json
